def solve(digitSum)
    MOD = 1000000007
    MAX_VAL = 5000
    MAX_SUM = 50 # Constraint on digitSum[i]

    # Helper function to calculate digit sum
    def get_digit_sum(n)
        sum = 0
        n = abs(n)
        while n > 0
            sum += n % 10
            n /= 10
        end
        sum
    end

    # Step 1: Precalculate Candidates[S] = list of numbers x in [0, 5000] where DS(x) = S
    # We use an array of size MAX_SUM + 1 (51)
    candidates = Array.new(MAX_SUM + 1) { [] }
    
    for x in 0..MAX_VAL
        s = get_digit_sum(x)
        if s <= MAX_SUM
            candidates[s] << x
        end
    end

    N = digitSum.length

    # DP_Prev[x]: Number of ways to form a valid prefix ending exactly at value x in the previous step (i-1)
    # Size MAX_VAL + 1 = 5001
    dpPrev = Array.new(MAX_VAL + 1, 0)

    # Step 2: Base Case (i = 0)
    S0 = digitSum[0]
    if S0 > MAX_SUM
        return 0
    end

    for x in candidates[S0]
        dpPrev[x] = 1
    end

    # Step 3: DP Transitions (i = 1 to N-1)
    for i in 1...N
        Si = digitSum[i]

        if Si > MAX_SUM
            return 0 # Impossible target digit sum
        end

        # a. Calculate Prefix Sums for DP_Prev
        # PrefixSum[x] = sum(dpPrev[z] for z <= x)
        prefixSum = Array.new(MAX_VAL + 1, 0)
        currentSum = 0
        for x in 0..MAX_VAL
            currentSum = (currentSum + dpPrev[x]) % MOD
            prefixSum[x] = currentSum
        end

        # b. Initialize DP_Curr
        dpCurr = Array.new(MAX_VAL + 1, 0)

        # c. Calculate DP_Curr[y]
        # y must satisfy DS(y) = Si
        for y in candidates[Si]
            # DP_Curr[y] = Sum of DP_Prev[x] for all x <= y
            # This is exactly prefixSum[y]
            dpCurr[y] = prefixSum[y]
        end

        # Update DP_Prev for the next iteration
        dpPrev = dpCurr
    end

    # Step 4: Final Result
    # Sum up all counts in the final dpPrev array
    totalCount = 0
    for x in 0..MAX_VAL
        totalCount = (totalCount + dpPrev[x]) % MOD
    end

    return totalCount
end
